methods.title: Methods crosswalk (publication guidance)
methods.subtitle: Frameworks these metrics align with; use them to draft Methods and reporting checklists
methods.decideAi: Reporting guideline for early-stage clinical evaluation of AI decision support (Nature Medicine 2022) — this system is a small-scale live clinical evaluation; map each of its 17 AI-specific items when submitting
methods.amie: Evaluation axes for conversational diagnostic AI: history-taking completeness, diagnostic accuracy, management, and empathic communication — the HPI completeness panel maps to its history-taking axis
methods.triage: Triage safety is reported as sensitivity/specificity and under-triage rate (JMIR and others) — red-flag session rate, detection latency and acknowledgement rate here are the corresponding process metrics; a formal paper needs physician adjudication as the gold standard
methods.pdqi: 9-dimension physician documentation quality instrument — physician approval rate here is a pragmatic proxy; for publication, sample notes for dual-rater PDQI-9 scoring and report ICC/kappa
methods.disclaimer: All figures are de-identified aggregates. Formal publication requires IRB approval, a pre-registered analysis plan, and confidence intervals appropriate to the sample size.
